sidebar.delete_project_confirm: Delete this project? Only the .dive/ folder will be removed. (Your code is preserved.)

stage.banner_all_verified: All steps complete — add another step or finish the session.
stage.banner_select_card: Select a roadmap step to work on.
stage.banner_decomposed: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed_empty: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed: Step ready — the agent will follow your instruction.
stage.banner_rejected: Step needs changes — edit it and try again.
stage.banner_verified: Checked — inspect changes or move to the next step.
stage.gate_no_session: Choose a project and start a session before describing a goal.
stage.gate_no_provider: Connect an AI assistant before planning, roadmap creation, and step execution.
stage.gate_no_cards: Describe your goal and draft a plan before step execution.
stage.gate_no_instruction: Describe what the agent should do for this step.

workmap.new_card_dialog_description: Write roadmap step {{index}} in a beginner-readable form.
workmap.new_card_learning_hint: Summary and acceptance criteria make later verification easier to understand.

onboarding.title: Connect your AI assistant
onboarding.description: After choosing a project folder, connect the AI assistant DIVE uses to plan, build, and check work.
onboarding.opencode_warning: Beta service · some free models may use data for training
onboarding.error_unauthorized: The key is invalid or lacks permission. ({{message}})
onboarding.error_network: Could not connect because of a network problem. ({{message}})

new_project.title: New project
new_project.description: Choose the folder to work in. DIVE will create `.dive/` inside it.
new_project.browse_unavailable: The folder picker is available in the desktop app.

chat.empty_no_project_description: Pick the local folder where DIVE will plan, create a roadmap, and run step-by-step coding work.
chat.empty_no_session_description: After your AI connection is ready, describe a goal so DIVE can draft a plan and roadmap.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.empty_title: Describe what you want to build.
roadmap.empty_description: Use chat to explain your goal. DIVE can turn it into Roadmap steps you can review.
roadmap.planning_no_files_changed: No files changed yet — planning mode only reads context until you approve a plan.

next_action.no_steps: Describe what you want to build in chat to create your roadmap.
next_action.pick_step: Pick a step to see what to do next.
next_action.planned: Add enough detail so the agent can work safely.
next_action.ready: Start this step from chat when you are ready.
next_action.working: Continue the conversation or review the latest agent output.
next_action.checking: Run Check and review the evidence before marking it done.
next_action.needs_changes: Ask for fixes, then check this step again.
next_action.done: Review changes, then move to the next step or integrate.
next_action.integrated: Choose another step or describe the next goal.

planning.interview_description: Start with a natural-language goal. DIVE asks at most 3 questions, then drafts a plan for your approval.
planning.goal_label: What do you want to build?
planning.goal_placeholder: I want to build a small habit tracker...
planning.goal_required: Describe what you want to build first.
planning.review_description: Approving this plan creates Roadmap steps. Cancel or go back to change it without creating files or steps.
planning.no_draft: No plan draft is ready yet.
planning.adjust_goal_seed: Adjust the plan for {{title}}. Problem to solve: {{reason}}

questions.product_shape: What are you trying to build first?
questions.mvp_focus: What should the first version prove?
questions.risk_level: How cautious should the agent be?

choices.user_can_add_and_see_data: User can add and see data

focus.user_can_add_and_see_data: user can add and see data

safety.tiny_safe_steps: Keep this step very small and ask before risky changes.
safety.explore_options_first: Compare the simplest options before changing files.
safety.balanced_mvp: Prefer the smallest useful MVP change and verify it.
safety.not_sure: Make the smallest reversible change that moves the goal forward.

mvp.script_or_tool: A small working tool for: {{goal}}. It should prove that {{focus}}.
mvp.desktop_app: A minimal desktop experience for: {{goal}}. It should prove that {{focus}}.
mvp.web_app: A minimal app screen for: {{goal}}. It should prove that {{focus}}.
mvp.not_sure: A minimal, safe first version of: {{goal}}. It should prove the core behavior before polish.

non_goals.new_dependencies: Do not add new dependencies unless the user approves.
non_goals.backend_or_fs: Do not change backend or filesystem behavior unless the step explicitly requires it.

success_criteria.beginner_describes: A beginner can describe the outcome in one sentence.
success_criteria.mvp_check_command: The MVP can be checked with a concrete command or manual smoke test.
success_criteria.next_step_obvious: The next step is obvious after the first version works.

1.title: Confirm the smallest useful version
1.summary: Turn the goal into a tiny MVP: {{mvp}}

acceptance.target_user_clear: The target user and first useful outcome are clear.
acceptance.open_questions_listed: Open questions are listed before implementation.

1.instruction_seed: {{safety}} Clarify the smallest useful version of: {{goal}}

2.title: Implement the first visible path
2.summary: Build only the UI or code path needed for the MVP.

acceptance.happy_path_works: The main happy path works end-to-end.
acceptance.unrelated_untouched: No unrelated files or features are changed.

2.instruction_seed: {{safety}} Implement the first visible path for: {{goal}}

3.title: Check and explain the result
3.summary: Run the smallest useful checks and explain what changed.

acceptance.checks_pass_or_explained: Relevant checks pass or failures are clearly explained.
acceptance.user_sees_diff: The user can see what changed and what remains.

3.instruction_seed: {{safety}} Verify the MVP and summarize the result for: {{goal}}

planning.request_changes_seed: I'd like to change part of the plan. Goal: {{goal}}. Please suggest which parts to reconsider.

recovery.title: Recovery & Undo
recovery.description: Save a safe point or undo to an earlier checkpoint if a step goes wrong.
recovery.no_checkpoints: No checkpoints found yet. Save a recovery point before risky work.
recovery.open_session: Open a project session to enable recovery.
recovery.restore_confirm_body: DIVE will ask the backend to restore {{checkpoint}}. The checkpoint system creates a pre-restore backup first, but files in your project will change.
recovery.restore_success_description: DIVE restored the project and saved a pre-restore backup.
recovery.explain_failure_prompt:
Explain this failure for {{title}} in beginner-friendly language and suggest the safest next action:
{{reason}}
recovery.rejected_reason: This step was marked as needing changes.

toast.tutorial_description: You can change this anytime in Settings > General.
toast.about_description: Desktop app for guiding a local AI coding agent through plan, run, check, and undo flows.
toast.retry_unavailable_description: DIVE could not find the last user message to resend.

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.body: Check your API key or login permission. Raw: {{message}}
auth.hints: Verify the key is correct.|Reconnect the provider in Settings.

rate_limit.title: Rate limit reached
rate_limit.body: The provider rate limit was reached. Raw: {{message}}
rate_limit.hints: Wait and retry.|Split the task into smaller steps if needed.

network.title: Network error
network.body: Check your network connection or firewall. Raw: {{message}}
network.hints: Confirm internet access.|If behind a proxy/VPN, ask an admin to allow the API domains.

tool_blocked.title: Blocked by safety policy
tool_blocked.body: DIVE blocked a risky or out-of-project operation. Raw: {{message}}
tool_blocked.hints: Make sure the command stays inside the project folder.|Break risky commands into safer smaller steps.

verify_fail.title: Verification failed
verify_fail.body: Review the check output and adjust the step or test command. Raw: {{message}}
verify_fail.hints: Read stdout/stderr first.|Undo the step and make the task more specific if needed.

unknown.title: Error
unknown.hints: Read the raw message and retry.

retro.title: Cycle retrospective
retro.description: Summarize the “{{title}}” step in your own words.
retro.learning_hint: Short answers are fine. This becomes evidence that you can explain what you built.
retro.intent_label: What did you intend to do?
retro.next_label: What would you do differently next time?
